description: This video explains the different types of tokens in the cryptocurrency space, including utility tokens, governance tokens, and non-fungible tokens (NFTs).
topic_summary: The video categorizes tokens based on their functions: transactional tokens for exchanges [t=5:52], governance tokens for voting [t=11:84], utility tokens for payments [t=17:12], and NFTs as unique cryptographic assets [t=39:97]. It also mentions the potential for new token types as the industry evolves [t=22:08].
